calendar.description: Senate Health and Human Services Hearing
House Health and Human Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill creates an incentive for private donations for senior nutrition programs.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>establishes the Senior Nutrition Private Donation Matching Fund; and<hr><ltbullet>creates a matching incentive for local area agencies that obtain qualifying private donations.
